revision_notes: Re-validated against current migration. Previous report based on outdated migration version.
summary: Database schema implementation is COMPLETE. All 22 tables present with comprehensive relationships, indexes, and constraints. All previously reported critical issues have been resolved. Minor items remain (updated_at on some tables, checkpoint_type ordering) but these are design choices for immutable records, not defects.

schema_completeness.details: All 22 tables present: 16 core + 3 QA + 3 Content. All columns match specification.

relationships.details: All relationships correctly defined with proper back_populates. is_active present on Project (line 134).

indexes.details: All indexes present including GIN index on templates.field_mappings (line 74).

constraints.details: All constraints correct. Image category includes all values (line 182). QA checkpoint types include all values.

jsonb_fields.details: All JSONB fields present: processing_config (line 83), parsed_data (line 201), step_data (line 258). GIN indexes on queryable fields.

audit_soft_delete.details: created_at and updated_at on all mutable tables. is_active on users (line 42) and projects (line 134). Some immutable tables (project_images, project_floor_plans) only have created_at by design.

naming_conventions.details: All tables and columns use snake_case. Index names follow idx_{table}_{column} pattern.

migration_quality.details: Migration creates all objects in correct order. downgrade() function present (lines 556-586) and properly ordered.

code_quality.details: Type hints with Mapped[], docstrings on model classes, __tablename__ explicit, __repr__ defined.

issues.description: qa_comparisons and qa_checkpoints have checkpoint_type values in different order
issues.rationale: Both tables include all required checkpoint types. Order difference has no functional impact.
Design decision - images are immutable records. Modifications create new records.
Design decision - floor plans are immutable records. Modifications create new records.

resolved_issues.description: templates missing GIN index on field_mappings

positive_findings: All 22 required tables are present and correctly structured
Comprehensive use of type hints with Mapped[] for type safety
Proper use of JSONB with GIN indexes for flexible data storage
Full-text search index correctly implemented on projects table (lines 156-164)
Cascade delete rules appropriately defined for dependent data
Foreign key indexes present on all FK columns for join performance
Status and date columns properly indexed for filtering and sorting
Email domain constraint correctly enforced with regex pattern (line 46)
All enum values properly validated with CHECK constraints
Good use of server_default for database-level defaults
Proper ondelete='SET NULL' for optional foreign keys
Docstrings present on all model classes
Migration follows correct dependency order for FK relationships
Complete downgrade() function for reversible migrations
